task_description: Build Phase 3 of the QI Platform: remaining CRUD endpoints (projects, registers, snapshots), security hardening (MFA encryption, password change, session cleanup), share tokens, deployment packaging (Dockerfile, docker-compose, nginx), integration tests, and frontend API client extensions.

verification.summary: npm run build exits 0. All 83 integration tests pass (26 existing + 57 new). Docker image builds successfully. Frontend smoke tests pass (199/199). Frontend engine tests pass. Semantic review v2 APPROVED. Issues from v1 review all addressed: transactional snapshot restore, share scope enforcement, crypto key validation, docker-compose env vars.
